{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Gardener 315
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The representatives of [[Gardener 315]] wear gray uniforms.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c28">''The Engineer'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
